headlines.headline: Halvav Brands sees 18% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement indicates significant operational efficiency gains that directly boost profitability.

headlines.headline: Jovor Networks names new head of precision manufacturing division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new head for the precision manufacturing division is a routine leadership update with minimal immediate market impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
